word: G3106 - μακαρίζω - makarízō - mak-ar-id'-zo - Call blessed

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μακαρίζω

- Transliteration: Makarizo

- Phonetic: mak-ar-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to pronounce blessed

- Origin: from G3107

- TDNT entry: 10:02,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3107; to beatify that is pronounce (or esteem) fortunate: - call blessed count happy.
